title: Big Bed Pack [LERT]
description: This resource pack (texture pack) changes the usual colors of your beds to themed ones - pixel art on the theme of childhood, games, and entertainment.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d35eb4020bfa82c0d44d28ee50466765e0c78a01_0.webp)
# **LOOK AT THIS:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lbwSXz524NQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I spent two days of my productive time to make your sleep a little more fun and comfortable.

 ![logo 2](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2023/432/17423040_xl.webp)
 
I tried to make some beds completely changed and in some only the top part was changed. 

![logo bye](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2023/432/17423052_l.webp)

_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Write in the comments which bed did you like the most?

</details>

_
